name: System.Address_To_Access_Conversions

documentation.description:
Provides the means to convert addresses to access types as defined by ARM
13.7.2.

access_types.name: Object_Pointer
access_types.code: type Object_Pointer is access all Object;

documentation.description: Access type definition to the object

Return ``Value`` as an *Address*.

This function is an intrinsic so implemented by the compiler.

Return ``Value`` as an access to *Object*.

This function is an intrinsic so implemented by the compiler.
